title: Torus
description: Torus: A standard solid circular ring torus, formed as a surface of revolution of a circle about an axis.

RadiusMajor.description: Distance from the Torus Centre (and the axis of revolution) to the centre of the circular cross section. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

RadiusMinor.description: The radius defining the size of the circular cross section. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].
